scaled_oracle_cases.description: Main scaled case covering both operators: validates non-empty versions, includes platform info, and uses adversarial attribute paths (solver.graph) while ignoring misleading _version.
scaled_oracle_cases.semantic_intent: Prove the function validates non-empty version strings and includes platform information, and correctly handles changed attribute paths (solver.graph instead of solution.nx) and ignores misleading _version.
scaled_oracle_cases.target_constraint: The function must raise ValueError if any version string is empty, must include a line with 'Platform:' in the output, must access NetworkX version via macsypy.solver.graph.__version__, and must use macsypy.__version__ (not _version).
scaled_oracle_cases.expected_failure_mode: Old seed behavior would omit platform, not validate versions, and would raise AttributeError or use wrong attribute path.
scaled_oracle_cases.call_code:
msg = get_version_message()
print(msg)
assert "Macsyfinder 1.2.3" in msg
assert "- Python" in msg
assert "- NetworkX" in msg
assert "- Pandas" in msg
assert "- Platform" in msg
assert "If you use this software please cite" in msg
assert "0.9.0" not in msg
result = msg
covered_requirements: Scaled executable cases must validate version strings and include platform info.
Scaled executable cases must run with the adversarially modified module and verify correct attribute access.

stdout_contains: If you use this software please cite

scaled_oracle_cases.description: Tests that function raises ValueError when macsypy.__version__ is empty, using the adversarial module to also verify attribute path robustness.
scaled_oracle_cases.semantic_intent: Prove the function raises ValueError when a version string is empty.
scaled_oracle_cases.target_constraint: The function must raise ValueError if any version string (macsypy.__version__, NetworkX, or Pandas) is empty.
scaled_oracle_cases.expected_failure_mode: Old seed behavior would output the message with empty version string, violating the validation requirement.
scaled_oracle_cases.setup_code:
import sys
import types
import pandas as pd
import networkx as nx
# Adversarial module with empty __version__ but other versions valid
macsypy = types.SimpleNamespace(__version__='',
                                _version='0.9.0',
                                solver=types.SimpleNamespace(graph=nx),
                                __citation__='Doe et al., 2023')
covered_requirements: Scaled executable cases must validate version strings and include platform info.
